author: m.kalinin
content: why do we put `execution_requests_root` into the `bid`?

author: potuz
content: To check that the requests in the block match those committed in the Payload, without having the Payload

author: m.kalinin
content: to be able to run beacon chain STF without a payload, i see

author: potuz
content: There point is that on checkpoint sync you get the state and we wanted to avoid requesting the previous payload to start syncing
